text.title: Modern BA Framework Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real applications of this methodology. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Framework is reselected every 3 months chasing industry trends.
antipattern.root-cause: Author treats framework as fashion, not commitment.
antipattern.fix: Lock framework for ≥6 months unless engagement context materially changes.

antipattern.symptom: Framework recommendation matches vendor's preferred toolchain regardless of context.
antipattern.root-cause: Author optimises for billable hours rather than engagement fit.
antipattern.fix: Force scoring against context-axes; require ≥1 axis where chosen framework wins on merit.

antipattern.symptom: Hybrid chosen without articulating which framework governs which artefact.
antipattern.fix: Require artefact-to-framework mapping when Hybrid is selected.
